languages.text: "Мне доложили, что союзникам удалось прорваться к дворцу. Но где же они?" {n}Аристократ смотрит в сторону ворот, затем переводит взгляд на вас, и легкое разочарование читается в мимике органической части его лица.{/n} "Только не говорите… Вы — все, кто уцелел, верно?"

"I've been informed that our allies have managed to break through to the palace. But where are they?" {n}The noble looks toward the gates, then at you, and the organic part of his face betrays his slight disappointment.{/n} "Don't tell me... You are all that's left?"
languages.original_text: "Мне доложили, что союзникам удалось прорваться к дворцу. Но где же они?" {n}Аристократ смотрит в сторону ворот, затем переводит взгляд на вас, и легкое разочарование читается в мимике органической части его лица.{/n} "Только не говорите… Вы — все, кто уцелел, верно?"

traits.locale_text: "I've been informed that our allies have managed to break through to the palace. But where are they?" {n}The noble looks toward the gates, then at you, and the organic part of his face betrays his slight disappointment.{/n} "Don't tell me... You are all that's left?"

"I've been informed that our allies have managed to break through to the palace. But where are they?" {n}The noble looks toward the gates, then at you, and the organic part of his face betrays his slight disappointment.{/n} "Don't tell me... You are all that's left?"

"I've been informed that our allies have managed to break through to the palace. But where are they?" {n}The noble looks toward the gates, then at you, and the organic part of his face betrays his slight disappointment.{/n} "Don't tell me... You are all that's left?"

languages.text: “我刚收到消息，说我们的盟友已突破防线进了宫殿。可他们人在哪儿呢？”{n}这位贵族望向宫门，又看向你，他那残存的有机肉脸上流露出一丝失望。{/n}“别告诉我……就只剩你们了？”
languages.original_text: "I've been informed that our allies have managed to break through to the palace. But where are they?" {n}The noble looks toward the gates, then at you, and the organic part of his face betrays his slight disappointment.{/n} "Don't tell me... You are all that's left?"

traits.locale_text: “我刚收到消息，说我们的盟友已突破防线进了宫殿。可他们人在哪儿呢？”{n}这位贵族望向宫门，又看向你，他那残存的有机肉脸上流露出一丝失望。{/n}“别告诉我……就只剩你们了？”

languages.text: « On m'informe que nos alliés ont réussi à se frayer un chemin jusqu'au palais... Mais dans ce cas, où sont-ils ? » {n}Le noble regarde les portes avant de se tourner vers vous, et la partie organique de son visage trahit une légère déception.{/n} « Ne me dites pas que... Il ne reste plus que vous ? »
languages.original_text: "I've been informed that our allies have managed to break through to the palace. But where are they?" {n}The noble looks toward the gates, then at you, and the organic part of his face betrays his slight disappointment.{/n} "Don't tell me... You are all that's left?"

traits.locale_text: « On m'informe que nos alliés ont réussi à se frayer un chemin jusqu'au palais... Mais dans ce cas, où sont-ils ? » {n}Le noble regarde les portes avant de se tourner vers vous, et la partie organique de son visage trahit une légère déception.{/n} « Ne me dites pas que... Il ne reste plus que vous ? »

languages.text: "Bana müttefiklerimizin saraya girmeyi başardığı bildirilmişti. Peki neredeler?" {n}Soylu, bir kapılara bir de sana bakıyor. Yüzünün organik kısmı, hissettiği hafif hayal kırıklığını ele veriyor.{/n} "Sakın bana... Geriye bir tek senin kaldığını söyleme."
languages.original_text: "I've been informed that our allies have managed to break through to the palace. But where are they?" {n}The noble looks toward the gates, then at you, and the organic part of his face betrays his slight disappointment.{/n} "Don't tell me... You are all that's left?"

traits.locale_text: "Bana müttefiklerimizin saraya girmeyi başardığı bildirilmişti. Peki neredeler?" {n}Soylu, bir kapılara bir de sana bakıyor. Yüzünün organik kısmı, hissettiği hafif hayal kırıklığını ele veriyor.{/n} "Sakın bana... Geriye bir tek senin kaldığını söyleme."

languages.text: «He sido informado de que nuestros aliados han logrado abrirse paso hasta el palacio, pero ¿dónde están?». {n}El noble mira hacia las puertas, luego te mira a ti, y la parte orgánica de su rostro deja entrever una leve decepción.{/n} «No me diga que... ¿son lo único que queda?».
languages.original_text: "I've been informed that our allies have managed to break through to the palace. But where are they?" {n}The noble looks toward the gates, then at you, and the organic part of his face betrays his slight disappointment.{/n} "Don't tell me... You are all that's left?"

traits.locale_text: «He sido informado de que nuestros aliados han logrado abrirse paso hasta el palacio, pero ¿dónde están?». {n}El noble mira hacia las puertas, luego te mira a ti, y la parte orgánica de su rostro deja entrever una leve decepción.{/n} «No me diga que... ¿son lo único que queda?».

languages.text: "Ich wurde informiert, dass unsere Verbündeten zum Palast durchbrechen konnten. Aber wo sind sie?" {n}Als der Adelige seinen Blick von den Toren zu dir wendet, erkennst du die Enttäuschung in seinem Gesicht.{/n} "Sagt nichts ... Ihr seid alles, was übrig ist?"
languages.original_text: "I've been informed that our allies have managed to break through to the palace. But where are they?" {n}The noble looks toward the gates, then at you, and the organic part of his face betrays his slight disappointment.{/n} "Don't tell me... You are all that's left?"

traits.locale_text: "Ich wurde informiert, dass unsere Verbündeten zum Palast durchbrechen konnten. Aber wo sind sie?" {n}Als der Adelige seinen Blick von den Toren zu dir wendet, erkennst du die Enttäuschung in seinem Gesicht.{/n} "Sagt nichts ... Ihr seid alles, was übrig ist?"

languages.text: 「同盟国が宮殿まで突破したと聞いております。しかし、彼らはどこにいるのでしょうか？」{n}貴族は門の方を見つめ、次にあなたを見つめ、彼の顔の有機的な部分が彼のわずかな失望を物語る。{/n}「まさか... あなたたちだけが残っているのですか？」
languages.original_text: "I've been informed that our allies have managed to break through to the palace. But where are they?" {n}The noble looks toward the gates, then at you, and the organic part of his face betrays his slight disappointment.{/n} "Don't tell me... You are all that's left?"

traits.locale_text: 「同盟国が宮殿まで突破したと聞いております。しかし、彼らはどこにいるのでしょうか？」{n}貴族は門の方を見つめ、次にあなたを見つめ、彼の顔の有機的な部分が彼のわずかな失望を物語る。{/n}「まさか... あなたたちだけが残っているのですか？」
